programme.title: The Office: Training Day
programme.desc: The new manager has everyone vying to make good first impressions. Andy finds himself awkwardly typecast, and Jim and Pam worry they may have come on too strong.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Protecting the Bees, Yourself & Your Health
programme.desc: Meet Bayer's Award-Winning Blue Ribbon Beekeeper Tucker Leck; learn how to protect yourself with a conducted electronic weapon; ways to maintain an active lifestyle for those with adult incontinence.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas List
programme.desc: After a health scare, a woman conjures up a last wish list of tasks for her daughter and granddaughter to do with the hopes of repairing their strained relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A consultant is hired by a workaholic mother in an effort to get her through the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: A runaway child rekindles a couple's love when it is all but over.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: A grandmother imparts wisdom and special holiday ornaments on her visiting granddaughter.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A New Beginning
programme.desc: The wolf pack braces for a looming wildfire that threatens completion of the barn. Noah walks down the aisle to become the first married Brown.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: A subculture of distillers across America carries on the backwoods tradition of moonshining. Now, judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, America's top legal and outlaw shiners go head to head to see who has what it takes to be called Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as legal and outlaw distillers compete to make the best rum. Constructing stills of their own design and mashing in their own raw ingredients, only one will survive elimination to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey
programme.desc: Heritage grains meet charred oak as three amateur distillers compete to make the best American Whiskey. Judged by Mark, Digger and Tim, they'll go head to head in a series of challenges to determine who has what it takes to be Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Moonshine of Mexico
programme.desc: Mark, Digger and Tim judge as top amateur distillers from both sides of the law compete to make mezcal, the moonshine of Mexico. Using agave mash, regional recipes and even meat, only one competitor will earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mountain Brandy
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete head-to-head to see who makes a classic Appalachian tradition called Mountain Brandy. Judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only the best will have what it takes to be named Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: The Man Who Walked Around the World
Moonshiners: Master Distiller
programme.desc: A subculture of distillers across America carries on the backwoods tradition of moonshining. Now, judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, America's top legal and outlaw shiners go head to head to see who has what it takes to be called Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Rum Conundrum

programme.title: The Man Who Walked Around the World
Gold Rush: White Water: Up the Creek
programme.desc: With winter quickly approaching, the Dakota Boys take on a creek-mining operation hoping to strike a pile of bedrock that will change their lives forever. Later, the crew decides if it's worth their while to continue mining next season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Superclaw
programme.desc: The Dakota boys bank their first gold hauls of the season. Dustin invents a custom super claw to remove massive boulders from his plunge pool. Fred and his crew are confronted by a deadly cable malfunction.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Gold Cave
programme.desc: Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions. Fred and his crew head upstream into a mini-waterfall to find a huge deposit of gold, but first they have to move their 700lb dredge up dangerous rapids.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Nugget Heaven
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt hits bedrock and a pile of nuggets at Rainbow's End. Fred chases the gold upstream into a dangerous new spot, forcing him to rethink his plans.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Thunder Falls
programme.desc: Dustin's on the best ground he's dredged when a new discovery opens the door to even more gold. Fred faces a life-and-death situation opening new ground at Thunder Falls.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: End of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Dustin cleans up with his biggest gold haul yet. At Thunder Falls, engine failure and giant boulders block Fred's path to gold, and as the problems escalate, his life is on the line.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Dustin takes a gamble to return to a spot just above McKinley Falls for the remainder of the season, but while moving his dredge down the side a cliff, giant falling rocks threaten his life.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rockfall Ravine
programme.desc: Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul of the year. Dustin faces an uncertain future and Carlos makes a surprising discovery at the new dive site.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Hands Full of Gold
programme.desc: Dakota Fred taps out Thunder Falls with his biggest gold haul. Dustin hits the nugget jackpot at Rockfall Ravine.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Mic Drop Pop!
programme.desc: Josh has a large knot on his head resulting from a car crash from 18 years ago. Brittney is covered in mysterious bumps. TJ has a hard, curious lump protruding from his side. Luis has a bump on his shoulder and his daughters fear it's dangerous.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: A Growth to Remember
programme.desc: Reginald hides the embarrassing growths on the back of his head with knitted hats. Jackie has lived with her huge shoulder lump for nine years. Leonardo has a chilling-looking growth on his head, but the thought of surgery terrifies him.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: A Nightmare on Skin Street
programme.desc: Larry has a hanging thigh growth so large that the weight of it makes his leg go numb. Cheerleader Bailee has a disappearing back bump she has named Ralph. With three complicated skin conditions, Ashley's case is considered a 'skin nightmare.'

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90% of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Mystery Blisters: Diagnosis Unknown
programme.desc: Fun-loving Che'Re has a squishy, dark bump on her cheek that has left her depressed and self-conscious. Buck has been breaking out in painful, fluid-filled blisters for three years. Telly developed a massive bump behind his head after being hit by a car.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Walking on Golf Balls
programme.desc: Danielle has the worst case of dancer's feet Dr. Schaeffer has ever seen, and life-threatening wounds may cause Dr. Vincent's patient to lose his feet. Dr. Haller has her work cut out for her with Crystal, whose mystery lumps are killing her feet.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: A young woman is rushed to the ER after being bitten in the face by a dog, an ER doctor has to overcome his fears when he's confronted with an unusual series of patients and an intoxicated woman injured in a fall unexpectedly goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Creepy Crawlies
programme.desc: A young woman is rushed to the ER after being bitten in the face by a dog, an ER doctor has to overcome his fears when he's confronted with an unusual series of patients and an intoxicated woman injured in a fall unexpectedly goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Regina King
programme.desc: Actress Regina King investigates her maternal family tree and uncovers an ancestor who was a radical civil rights activist in Alabama; a man who came out of slavery, endured horrific violence, but never stopped fighting for his people.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Matthew Morrison
programme.desc: Actor Matthew Morrison is shocked to discover his American roots go back to the Revolutionary War. He learns of the brutality his six times great-grandfather faced on the battlefield and struggles with the choices he made to defend his beliefs.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quintuple Trouble
programme.desc: Adam returns to work, leaving Danielle to care for the quintuplets and Blayke by herself for the first time. On Adam's first day back, Hazel falls ill with a fever, leaving the family scrambling and Danielle feeling overwhelmed and alone.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Should We Stay or Should We Go?
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle realize they need a larger home, but house hunting proves stressful when they realize what a larger house will cost. Later, the family heads back to their hometown, and Danielle comes up with an idea that could solve all their problems.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Farmer bride Katie's stylist sister convinced Katie to ditch her jeans and cowboy boots for a wedding gown for her special day. Courtney's looking for a flashy ball gown. Jennifer vowed to lose a lot of weight, so she ordered her dress a size too small.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: Kristy lost 100 pounds and is looking for the right dress to show off her new figure. Kristin lost 40 pounds and is excited to fit into dress samples.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'll Know It When I See It
programme.desc: Bride Brooke wants a unique, one of kind gown, and won't settle for anything less. Bling queen Amanda hopes to add even more bling to her wedding dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not What I Was Expecting
programme.desc: Emily, a rock star by night, wants to shake her all-black attire for a traditional gown. Brittany has bright red hair and tattoos and wants to show them off in a sexy lace gown. Lauren is nervous that her friends will think her dress is too unusual.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Engaged partners Amy and Lex are very much in sync - but not with each other's wedding dress styles. Then, bride Tara is looking to stand out in a non-traditional, high-neck dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Once Upon a Bride
programme.desc: Amber has always dreamed of wearing a fairy tale, princess gown on her big day but her aunt is pushing for a more grown up look. Julie is looking for the perfect dress for her vow renewal ceremony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: When the Leading Man Takes a Stand
programme.desc: To bride Kiara, the only opinion that matters is her grandfather's. But when Kiara falls for a dress over budget, she risks leaving the salon empty handed. Strength competitor Talia struggles to find a dress that pleases both her vision and her fiancé's.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Wedding Gown Bro Down
programme.desc: Bride Taylor is all about glitz and glam, so naturally she wants her wedding dress to be a show-stopper. But with her NFL star brother Maurice Jones Drew paying for the dress, will her over the top dress dreams come true?

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Sitcom Spirits
programme.desc: It's an hour of sitcom legends as Theresa gives readings to Martin's Tisha Campbell, Facts of Life's Mindy Cohn, Cheers' John Ratzenberger, Designing Women and Young Sheldon's Annie Potts and I Dream Of Jeannie icon Barbara Eden.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Freezing Theresa

programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Who Done It?
programme.desc: Food Network's Lorraine Pascale and Damaris Phillips are in the arena to figure out which baker will take on Bobby Flay. Spunky cake master Andrea Bergin and New Orleans pastry chef Jeremy Fogg show their skills for the chance at making history.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sour With The Sweet
programme.desc: Barbecue fusion master Robert Cho and over-the-top Brian Malarkey are hungry for a win. Food Network's Sunny Anderson and chef Josh Capon will be serving one of them up to Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Not a Speck
programme.desc: A Spanish cuisine expert and a Portuguese chef come to duke it out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Greeking Out
programme.desc: The kitchen goes metal when Iron Chef Jose Garces and Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell team up to take down their good friend, Bobby Flay. They've handpicked "Tagine Queen" Aneesa Waheed and hard-hitting chef Ryan Lory to deliver the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mince Meat
programme.desc: Tough-guy-with-heart-of-gold Fernando Ruiz battles Mexican-born chef Paco Garcia for a chance at Bobby Flay, with chefs Donatella Arpaia and Scott Conant deciding which of them can make a dish as perfect as Scott's hair.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Drop The Beat (Bobby)!
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon and actress Brooke Shields band together to take Bobby Flay down. With Italian chef and restaurateur Carla Pellegrino and Atlanta's Idris Muhammad on their side, Bobby will be singing a different tune.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Green, White and Red
programme.desc: Little Italy is in the house when Naples-born Raffaele Ronca goes up against Italian expert Ken Vedrinski. Food Network veterans Anne Burrell and Scott Conant bring their expertise to the arena to get Bobby Flay beat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Deja Flay
programme.desc: Beat Bobby Flay winner Anne Burrell is ready to battle once again, but this time she'll have to cook against hotshot chef Marcus Samuelsson. Food Network's Scott Conant sits back and relaxes as his dream team takes center stage.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Winning in My Dreams
programme.desc: Pop singer Debbie Gibson and The Kitchen's Katie Lee team up to bring a winning tune to Bobby Flay's arena. Dutch-born Ype Von Hengst and Greek expert Chef William Wright compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Nutty Times
programme.desc: Chopped's Geoffrey Zakarian and Amanda Freitag enlist Jimmy Buffett's private chef Dante Giannini and Telluride's Eliza Gavin to edge out the win and wipe out Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Somewhere Over the Rainbow
programme.desc: Food Network's Alex Guarnaschelli and Chef Michael Voltaggio love nothing more than getting Bobby Flay beat. They're cheering on fine dining expert Jennifer Dewasha and seafood aficionado Devin Bozkaya, who are ready to battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beat Bobby Flay: The Musical
programme.desc: Things get lyrical in the kitchen when Food Network's Damaris Phillips gets TV host Jaymee Sire to join her sing-along that doesn't end, much to Bobby Flay's annoyance.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All About That Baste
programme.desc: Bobby Flay has a full house for Turkey Day when he's joined by Food Network's Damaris Phillips and Man v. Food host Casey Webb. Chefs Kevin Grossi and Lindsay Porter want a second helping of victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Turkey's Done
programme.desc: Food Network's Sunny Anderson and Bobby's daughter Sophie are in the house for a battle between silent but deadly Clayton Chapman and Italian authority Tony Priolo.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Thanks But No Thanksgiving
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving, and Martha Stewart joins Scott Conant to ensure Bobby Flay gets the short end of the wishbone. Omar Zerrei and Ed Cotton aim to send Bobby back.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Challah At Your Boy!
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Jay Pharoah plot and strategize on how to get Bobby Flay beat. Canadian chef Rene Rodriguez brings his south of the border flavors against the Italian fare of chef Michael Kramer.

programme.title: Black-ish: Switch Hitting

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Layoff

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Baby Daddy
programme.desc: A man shows up claiming to be Cora's father. Meanwhile Renee promotes a blood drive party.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Phobia
programme.desc: Will discovers that an old friend of Sasha's is making herself sick.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Confession
programme.desc: Vera thinks she is dying and confesses a secret. Simone tells Brianna she's pregnant.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Best Friend

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Zathura: A Space Adventure

programme.title: Movie: Heebie Jeebies

programme.title: Movie: It Follows

programme.title: Movie: A Nightmare on Elm Street

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Testing a New Area
programme.desc: Alison takes the opportunity to get to know a new neighborhood and build in a different area of Chicago despite Donovan's hesitation. While the project goes smoothly, cracks continue to spread in their partnership.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Historical Headache

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Waterfront Paradise vs. Garden District Home

programme.title: Selling the Big Easy: Radiant River Home vs. Creekside Cottage
programme.desc: A New Orleans couple wants a bigger home in their current neighborhood. They hope to find a property with outdoor space, an open layout and room for the kids. Then, Brittany transforms a focal point wall to create an inviting feature for potential buyers.

programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Vehicles
programme.desc: Flying using only water power; an underwater car; a boat that is built to deliberately sink; a huge plane style boat that might revolutionize travel.

programme.title: World's Strangest: Explosions

programme.title: World's Strangest: Places

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Saw It Coming

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Whispers from the Woods
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania town is consumed with suspicion after 19-year-old Erica Miller disappears without a trace. Her mother posts flyers around town, prompting one resident to question the strange behavior of a family friend.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Ride Along
programme.desc: One night in 1993, in Manhattan Beach, California, an officer is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop. The only witness is a young boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Whispers from the Woods
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania town is consumed with suspicion after 19-year-old Erica Miller disappears without a trace. Her mother posts flyers around town, prompting one resident to question the strange behavior of a family friend.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: The Ride Along
programme.desc: One night in 1993, in Manhattan Beach, California, an officer is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop. The only witness is a young boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Shadow Walker
programme.desc: Sandi Musk thinks dating Andy LeFleur is a welcomed distraction from her ongoing divorce. But when it becomes clear he wants more than she's ready to give, she tries to call things off. Thing is, this is one guy who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Unbreakable: Live to Tell: Snow Day
programme.desc: Gina Edwards' dreams of having her cousin live close by are quickly dashed when her aunt's live-in boyfriend starts showing a darker side. As the three women team up to take a stand against Stephen, a seemingly normal night ends in tragedy.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Ice Cold Heart
programme.desc: On a snowy Wisconsin morning, an 18-year-old mother is found beaten, stabbed and strangled to death with her 3 month old son as her only witness. Leads soon grow cold and the chase for a suspect leads detectives to a vicious killer who's close to home.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Hitchhike to Hell
programme.desc: Colorado police in hot pursuit of a serial killer are horrified when the pre-recorded message of a pager found in the snow near a victim's abandoned vehicle reveals an unthinkable predator: one sworn to protect and serve.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A woman's body is found burned to death in a burning car. As the smoke settles, police arrive and find an abandoned car seat in the back seat. Investigators are frantic to find the child and fear a vicious killer lurks in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Night Alone
programme.desc: College sophomore Gina Tenney is thrilled to be living all on her own. That is until she discovers she's got a stalker. And when she and her tormentor finally come face-to-face, it brings an even bigger surprise: this secret admirer is no stranger.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn
programme.desc: 20-year-old Kristy Ray is living at home and working her way through college until one day when she is shockingly abducted. Local law enforcement will need the help of the FBI and community members as they race to find Kristy before time runs out.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Play Dead
programme.desc: After 30-year-old single mom Kaye Robinson turns a suspicious late-night stranger away from her door, she has no idea the threat to her family is far from over. But with her young son in the home, she'll do everything in her power to keep him safe.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He Seems Perfect
programme.desc: Budding New York fashion designer Jenae Aragosa falls hard for bartender Trevor Frederick. But as a dark side of her new man comes to light, Jenae comes to realize she'll be lucky if she makes it out of this relationship alive.

programme.title: American Monster: Shooting Phoenix
programme.desc: A monster stalks the summer streets of Phoenix in 2005. With never-before-seen footage, we get a glimpse into the killer's life and how he's able to hide in plain sight. Can police catch him before he strikes again?

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: American Monster: Take Me to the River
programme.desc: Coming home from church, a local preacher finds his wife brutally stabbed and beaten, the apparent victim of a home invasion. His alibi is sound, as are their two grown sons. However, several details just don't add up. The truth shocks everyone.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Supernatural Nazis
programme.desc: The story of Allied Germanic heroes found in an abandoned salt mine.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: End of Days: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: Smallpox, the Black Death, Spanish Flu, Zika. History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that ensues.

programme.title: End of Days: Aliens Invade
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: End of Days: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Set against the flawed history of biblical prophecy, and the dangerous apocalyptic philosophy of violent groups ISIS, discover the past and future apocalyptic beliefs and the dark times of End-Times prophecy.

programme.title: End of Days: Planet X
programme.desc: A giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down is on course to destroy us. Planet X has caused mass extinctions in the past and some are preparing for the next celestial Armageddon.

programme.title: End of Days: Aliens Invade
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: End of Days: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Set against the flawed history of biblical prophecy, and the dangerous apocalyptic philosophy of violent groups ISIS, discover the past and future apocalyptic beliefs and the dark times of End-Times prophecy.

programme.title: End of Days: Planet X

programme.title: End of Days: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: Smallpox, the Black Death, Spanish Flu, Zika. History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that ensues.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Supernatural Nazis
programme.desc: The story of Allied Germanic heroes found in an abandoned salt mine.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Yakuza
programme.desc: We go on the hunt to unearth the secrets of a widespread criminal gang in the heart of Japan who are engaged in a variety of criminal activity including extortion, prostitution and illegal gambling. It is a hard-hitting, slick-dressing network of gangs.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Ohio Hay Barn: The Whole Story

programme.desc: A Manhattan Beach, California, family of five hopes to stay close to the beach while finding more space. Affordable homes in their dream location all require renovation.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: An Underground Renovation
programme.desc: A couple braces themselves for the harsh realities that come with buying a fixer upper while searching for their first home in Denver.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: West Hills, CA, newlyweds are eager to buy their first home together. He's a second-generation real estate agent so they feel confident they have the skills to lock in the perfect house.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: We're going after picture-perfect dishes that taste as good as they look.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Explore the branches of the food scene in the nation's capital with Andrew Zimmern.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Boston
programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: Movie: The Goonies
programme.desc: When a group of children stumble upon a treasure map, they embark on a harrowing mission to recover the treasure of a notorious 17th century pirate.

programme.title: Movie: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
programme.desc: A rogue prince and a princess race to keep an ancient dagger safe from dark forces. The dagger, a gift from the Gods, would allow its possessor to reverse time and rule the world.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a bitter miser named Ebenezer Scrooge is visited by many spirits who show him the errors of his ways and give him the chance to redeem himself.

programme.title: Movie: Lilo & Stitch
programme.desc: A lonely Hawaiian girl adopts a notorious extra-terrestrial fugitive as her pet.

programme.title: Bones: The Daredevil in the Mold
programme.desc: A BMX rider's remains are discovered on the roof of a warehouse after a failed attempt to complete a bike stunt. Meanwhile, Sweets turns to Booth for advice about proposing to Daisy.

programme.title: Bones: The Bikini in the Soup
programme.desc: When the liquefied remains of a wedding planner are found in her home tanning bed on Valentine's Day, Cam pressures her team to solve the case in time for her to celebrate the holiday with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Bones: The Killer in the Crosshairs
programme.desc: After notoriously murdering The Gravedigger, sniper-on-the-loose Jacob Broadsky strikes again. This time, his victim is a prior suspect who escaped the justice system. Booth must use his own military training to beat the sniper at his own game.

programme.title: Bones: The Blackout in the Blizzard
programme.desc: A severe blizzard causes a city-wide blackout, adding to the obstacles the team must overcome in order to solve a murder case that could be linked to a potential viral outbreak.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Three downtrodden working stiffs decide to launch their own business, but a slick investor stops them in their tracks. They hatch a half-baked scheme to kidnap the investor's son and demand a ransom, with which they can reclaim their business.

programme.title: Movie: Tag
programme.desc: Five highly competitive adult friends have played the same game of tag for years during the month of May, and when the only undefeated player's wedding lands in the game month the others are confident that they can finally bring him down to size.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Evaluation Session
programme.desc: The Interns of the NSA suffer through their worst fear: a randomized evaluation test administered by the mysterious higher-ups.

programme.title: Movie: Life of the Party
programme.desc: With her daughter finally off to college, a middle-aged mother decides to return to finish her own education, which she gave up to raise her family. She soon embraces the college lifestyle that she never got the opportunity to enjoy in her youth.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The List
programme.desc: After a sailor is murdered in the champagne room of a strip club, the team links the murder weapon to two additional unsolved cases. Also, Brody's ex-fiancé pays her a surprise visit.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Insider
programme.desc: While conducting an autopsy on a petty officer who is believed to have died from natural causes, an armed man enters the morgue and holds Wade, Sebastian and Danny hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Baitfish
programme.desc: The team investigates a deadly explosion at the Navy-Marine Corps Relief Gala event they were attending. They discover that Pride was the intended target of the bomb.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Abyss
programme.desc: When a navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in double murders aboard a research boat, the team partners with the Coast Guard Investigative Service to work the case. Meanwhile, Lasalle tracks down his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: More Now
programme.desc: Pride is adamant the elusive 'Baitfish' has returned and, in an attempt to locate his nemesis, he has the team investigate crime scenes and chase leads from New Orleans to Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The List
programme.desc: After a sailor is murdered in the champagne room of a strip club, the team links the murder weapon to two additional unsolved cases. Also, Brody's ex-fiancé pays her a surprise visit.

programme.title: Movie: Tag
programme.desc: Five highly competitive adult friends have played the same game of tag for years during the month of May, and when the only undefeated player's wedding lands in the game month the others are confident that they can finally bring him down to size.

programme.title: Movie: Pretty Woman

programme.title: Movie: Goodfellas
programme.desc: A tough New York mobster becomes the target of both the government and the Mafia.

programme.title: Movie: My Cousin Vinny

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead: Honey

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: The Fast and The Furious

programme.title: Gold Rush: Come Hell or High Water

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rocky Mountain Gold

programme.title: Gold Rush: Come Hell or High Water

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore

programme.title: Storage Wars: Last Mattress Standing
programme.desc: The buyers hit Norwalk in hope of finding hidden finds, while Darrell has his eyes on a higher prize.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Footloose
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal call out bizarre names while working the front desk of an office, and tonight's loser gets up close and personal with some strange feet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Evaluation Session
programme.desc: The Interns of the NSA suffer through their worst fear: a randomized evaluation test administered by the mysterious higher-ups.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: The Misery Index: The Grandma's Special
programme.desc: They may be senior citizens but these awesome ladies sure have lived! Find out what happens when a young bull charges you, and what bodily function made a girl lose 10 years of memories.

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: That's My Wife

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: I Hate Myself
programme.desc: On this show, we learn three things: don't let Mo Amer call 911, don't ask Jenny Zigrino how you look, and never let Mo Mandel speak to the audience.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Guy travels to places where things are still done the old-fashioned way. In Oklahoma City, a steak house has been serving the same menu items for more than 80 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Guy explores restaurants that serve literally from the farm and the ocean to the table.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Briskets
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into everything from chicken to brisket. In Fargo, N.D., a funky place piling barbecue onto mac and throwin' heat into wings. A Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Taste Of Italy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up his favorite Italian joints from over the years. In Scottsdale, Arizona, a real-deal Italian grocer crankin' out scratch-made staples like gnocchi and prosciutto that bring a tear to Guy's eye.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Turkey-Giving
programme.desc: Guy's dishin' out the spirit of Thanksgiving! In Princeton, N.J., Rev Run jumps in at a crepe place serving their take on a turkey club and a 20-layer cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting the road and taking a detour to find some out-of-the-ordinary eats. In Chico, California, a Hawaiian-Asian fusion spot serving up righteous ramen and a fried chicken bao.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat in the Middle
programme.desc: Guy is grabbing dishes stacked and stuffed with off-the-hook goodness. In Baltimore, he checks out the pasta bar rolling out delicious ravioli and topping things off with their killer clams.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Briskets
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into everything from chicken to brisket. In Fargo, N.D., a funky place piling barbecue onto mac and throwin' heat into wings. A Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up his favorite Italian joints from over the years. In Scottsdale, Arizona, a real-deal Italian grocer crankin' out scratch-made staples like gnocchi and prosciutto that bring a tear to Guy's eye.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Open 24/7
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes 'round the clock at some places with great food at any hour of the day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mama's Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits a dive in Oklahoma serving wings and waffles and a Polish joint in L.A.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Joints
programme.desc: Guy visits a St. Louis tavern for German spaetzle, and Virginia for calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homestyle
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Seattle that are serving homestyle cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Near to Far
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a trip around the world without leaving the U.S. An Italian eatery in Boston is still serving up real-deal dishes from the homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Poke, Pork and Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's checking in on some of his favourite joints serving up a bite for any time of day. In Chicago, things have changed a lot for Guy's poke buddies. In Denver, a triple threat is adding some new biscuit sandwiches and late-night Italian options.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Truckapalooza
programme.desc: Guy's pulling up to some of the tastiest food trucks on DDD. From burgers in Key West, Fla., to chilaquiles in California, tacos in Hawaii to fresh catches in Canada, these mobile kitchens are running the gamut of grub-on-the-go.

programme.desc: Special guests Ted Allen, Christian Petroni and Martina McBride join a 'friendsgiving' filled with turkey day favourites. The star of the table is Jeff's sweet and spicy smoked turkey and gravy with Ted's side of triple sec cranberry relish.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Giada's Italian Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Giada is ready to host this year's family Thanksgiving dinner. She's putting Italian twists on classic holiday dishes like polenta popovers with lemon butter, baked turkey parmesan, sweet and salty mashed potatoes and chocolate pumpkin cheesecake souffle.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Thanksgiving Brunch
programme.desc: It's the morning after Thanksgiving, and Giada has a house full of guests and a fridge filled with leftovers! The solution is a casual Thanksgiving brunch that incorporates the flavors of the holiday.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Thanksgiving 101
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes her must-have Thanksgiving recipes. The feast includes her foolproof simple roasted turkey with an herby butter, easy cornbread and sausage stuffing and classic giblet gravy. Plus, Ree shares the trick to a shortcut cranberry sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Merc Deliveries
programme.desc: Work on Ree Drummond's mercantile store and deli is going full steam ahead, and she's cooking to keep the construction wheels in motion. First, fabulous Spicy Fried Chicken Sandwiches piled high with crunchy coleslaw.

programme.title: The Kitchen: No-Rules-Giving
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are breaking all the Thanksgiving rules to make a fun, easy and creative feast. Katie Lee and Sunny Anderson kick things off with their twists on turkey.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: All About the Sides
programme.desc: Kardea Brown is keeping her favorite holiday, Thanksgiving, intimate with a special meal for Ma and Grandma. Grandma always brings the turkey, so Kardea is taking on the sides, with candied yams, oyster stuffing and cranberry custard pie for dessert.

programme.title: Turkey Day Sunny's Way
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson celebrates Thanksgiving and being named the first guest editor of Food Network Magazine. She makes her grilled butterflied turkey with lemon pepper glaze and her crowdsourced stuffing.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pressed for Time

programme.desc: Wade seeks the notorious flesh eaters of the Amazon, including a fish that can swallow a man whole.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rift Valley Killers

programme.title: River Monsters: Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Tales of a body-snatching spirit called the Water Mama have reached Jeremy. With people disappearing without a trace, Jeremy is convinced there is a real river monster lurking behind the legend.

programme.title: River Monsters: Canadian Horror
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness comes stories of a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap.

programme.title: River Monsters: Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Killer Beasts of the Deep
programme.desc: In the Amazon, Jeremy Wade uncovers the truth behind the Sobrai Santos last voyage, dubbed the Amazon Apocalypse. In Alaska, Jeremy is determined to encounter a lethal lake monster responsible for dragging innocent lives to an icy grave.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Killer Beasts of the Deep
programme.desc: In the Amazon, Jeremy Wade uncovers the truth behind the Sobrai Santos last voyage, dubbed the Amazon Apocalypse. In Alaska, Jeremy is determined to encounter a lethal lake monster responsible for dragging innocent lives to an icy grave.

programme.title: River Monsters: Death Down Under
programme.desc: When six men vanish in the remote waters of northern Australia, extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the scene and embarks on one of his toughest investigations yet, taking on some of the deadliest animals on the planet in his search for a suspect.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Treasures
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade's adventures have netted a treasure trove of exotic curiosities, from lucky charms to penis sheaths; from knife-proof gloves to yak-skin. Jeremy shares the bizarre, untold stories behind some of his most memorable monster catches.

programme.title: River Monsters: Specials: Size Matters
programme.desc: Jeremy re-lives seven blockbuster catches from around the world, including a heart-stopping encounter with a 20-foot bone-crusher in an Amazonian river. From deep-water sharks to alien giants, Jeremy wrestles massive beasts.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Overcoming Obstacles
programme.desc: Injured elephant, Man-Jai, desperately needs emergency tusk surgery, while a massive clean-up operation begins for a family of hippos. A bent beak jeopardizes a couple of lovebird penguins, and a strange resident gets VIP treatment.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Malu's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: The games begin for keepers when orangutan Malu destroys his playroom. An elderly horse must undergo a risky procedure, and keepers must decide if it's time to say goodbye to one of the zoo's most beloved giraffes.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: What to Do When Expecting
programme.desc: A routine health check takes a frightening turn for lion brothers Lwazi and Ato. Keepers anxiously await to see if otter couple Odie and Paula are expecting, and a gorilla called Kanzi must prove she can receive vital medical care.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Saving Daisy
programme.desc: A team races to save a wombat named Daisy suffering from mysterious health issues before it's too late. Keepers Georgie and Luke venture on a challenging road trip to transport a giraffe calf, and a secret hidden underneath the Melbourne Zoo is revealed.
