programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: How It's Made: Stainless Steel, Football Helmets
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Internal Health of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Healthy living starts with the nutrition and ingredients we consume, so George Davison sends Darieth Chisolm to explore the evolution of organic ingredients in Vermont.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Armageddon USA
programme.desc: When the people of a thriving Midwestern town suddenly disappear, they leave behind an eerie ghost town with a dark secret. Experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if the mysterious exodus could be evidence of a freak natural disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Final Sale
programme.desc: 50-year-old Beverly Carter is an internet savvy real-estate agent, but when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she goes missing. The search for Beverly goes viral, but depends on unravelling a web of false identities and fake clues.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Adopted 17-year-old Chelsea Schobert has always felt out of place at home. She seeks acceptance online where she meets Shawn. But as their relationship develops, all is not as it seems and the whole family is drawn into a devastating series of events.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love at First Text
programme.desc: When a single mom finds her dream man online, she can't believe her luck. But her quest to meet him soon turns into every mother's worst nightmare. As police scramble to avert tragedy, they discover the most elaborate web of lies they've ever seen.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Who Shot Buckii?
programme.desc: It's the middle of the night when Delvin 'Buckii' Meadows is shot and killed in his neighbor's yard. As police investigate, it's not until witnesses come forward with information that detectives realize they may be the key to finding Delvin's killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Terror in the Court
programme.desc: A father lunges at a militia member; a defendant sucker punches a lawyer; a woman is chased by a judge; a man threatens to kill his family; a deputy attacks a defendant; a drunk driver crashes into a courthouse; and a proposal shocks a probation officer.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Predators Among Us
programme.desc: Infamous sex abuse sports doctor attacked by angry parent; a gang member, a snitch and the F.B.I. collide; defiant defendant curses out judge; murderer taunts mother of two teenage sons; singing for a lenient sentence; prisoner meets his baby in court.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Who Shot Buckii?

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Kentucky Thrill Ride
programme.desc: Mike and Elizabeth Turpin are the perfect couple. But when Elizabeth meets a mysterious woman with a disturbing secret she finds herself plunged into an out of control world of casual sex, drugs, steamy lesbian affairs, and ultimately- a shocking murder.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Tall, Dark and Deadly
programme.desc: Chanin Starbuck is a mother of five looking forward to a fresh start after divorcing her ex husband, Clay. She starts dating online and meets several men who appear to be nice guys, but Chanin will find out the men she's meeting aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Murderous Mormons
programme.desc: Two brothers believe they have finally broken free from a dangerous Mormon fundamental cult and its egomaniacal leader. Then, nearly two decades later, a deadly hit from a prison cell brings them right back into the fold.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Gypsy Seduction
programme.desc: Lifelong bachelor Andrew Vlasto spontaneously marries a beautiful and much younger woman who draws him into the shadowy world of a notorious Romani gypsy crime clan, where seduction is a deadly weapon.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Murder in Amish Country
programme.desc: Katie Gingerich's isolated Old Order Amish community is unequipped to protect her as her own husband careens towards a deranged and horrifying act of violence that rocks the peaceful Amish community to its core. One of the 3 Amish murders ever documented.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sum of Love
programme.desc: A friendship between a math teacher and assistant principal turns into a connection far deeper. But when a possessive estranged husband threatens their relationship and their safety, the pair take drastic measures to protect themselves against him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Family Matters
programme.desc: Puppy love is thwarted when a teen boy's traditional parents try to keep the young couple apart by moving him to another country. But the distance only serves to make his heart grow fonder and he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with his girl.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: When the sexy and beautiful Charlene is around, sparks fly. But the sparks aren't limited to one man. One after another, Josh, Jace, Tim and Casey all go crazy vying for her love. And while love is a many splendored thing, it can also have a body count.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A teenage romance gets caught in family ties.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Isolation
programme.desc: Chad and Jo meet by chance and to this pair of free spirits, their connection feels cosmic. They fall in love and move far from everyone they know. Soon their new life is ripped apart by jealous ex-partners, isolation, and a desperate need for control.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bloody Matrimony
programme.desc: Steve Dingle, a young Filipino immigrant, returns to his homeland to find a bride. It seems like a match made in heaven when he meets Cathy. But pressure builds in their marriage that will explode into infidelity, violence, and murder.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make a Dummy Out of Sheets
programme.desc: While facing five life sentences for a spree of Florida robberies, Frankie Lee Bass makes a daring escape and goes on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Kill my Step-Dad
programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.desc: When Jorgen discovers that Cosmo never graduated from the Fairy Academy, he threatens to take away his job as a Fairy Godparent. To solve the mystery of what happened, the gang looks through Cosmo's memories of his teenage years.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chief/ Twistory
programme.desc: Timmy decides to run for student body president to gain the attention of a popular gild.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Cheer and Present Danger
programme.desc: When only one of them makes the cheerleading squad, Phoebe and Cherry's friendship is tested. Max wins a month of free pizza and has to convince his family that he didn't cheat.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Change of Art
programme.desc: Phoebe gets Billy's help with an art project only to find he took the piece from a museum.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mountain Out of a Molehill
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: DuckTales: New Gods on the Block!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Never Smooch a Snake
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Best Frog Friends
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Koala Inception
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Dungeon
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Party Puppers
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Valentine's Dance/ Green Streets
programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Candace Disconnected/ Magic Carpet Ride
programme.desc: Candace has no choice but to go to her brothers for help after she loses her phone for the fifth time. Then, inspired by Dad's favourite childhood program, the boys decide to create a magic carpet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Battle in the Skies!
programme.desc: Dante challenges Pheng to a rematch. After the battle, the gang heads to Battle Island to compete in a Blading circuit.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Aiming for the Top Floor!
programme.desc: A second day in Malie City provides our heroes with a hard-earned change for some unexpected excitement.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Climate Conundrum Iron Rivalry

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver
programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day

programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Case of Dress Distress
programme.desc: Jamie is devastated when she falls in love with an over-budget gown her bossy bridesmaid picks out. Natalie has trouble committing to a dress in the absence of her ill mother. Fitting bride Nadia is nervous her reception gown will be the wrong colour.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Designer Dreams
programme.desc: Liz is in the salon with Danielle Jonas, and wants to show off her new body. Courtney Cason said yes to Mark Zunino's sketch, but now it's time to try on the real gown. Jillian wants a fashion forward dress but her mom isn't making it easy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Emily and her very opinionated father want the perfect princess ball gown for her big day. Bride Danielle's father passed away, and she hopes to find a gown he would have loved.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: V.I.Pnina
programme.desc: Sometimes when Kleinfeld is closed the salon will specially open the doors for clients with unlimited budgets to have private appointments with their designers. Pnina Tornai meets individually with three budget-less brides for a record-breaking day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Breaking the Bank
programme.desc: Alexis has searched everywhere for a certain gown, only to now find it's double her budget. Jenna's dream dress turns into a nightmare when it's $7,000 over budget. Lauren is committed to going over budget on her see-through bodice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Booby Trap
programme.desc: Danielle's size 34, J-cup chest is blowing her budget sky high. Stephanie wants to show off the goods, but her mother certainly does not. Christie purchased a dress to flaunt her bust, but after losing weight, she hopes it still does.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Want My Daughter to Look Like a Sexpot
programme.desc: Randy's mom visits for her 93rd birthday, and she's happy to share her fiery opinions with everyone shopping at Kleinfeld. Timid bride Courtney's appointment gets hijacked by her very provocative mother. Katie needs a gown suitable for two big secrets.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Purple Unicorn
programme.desc: Bride Nik, rock star and former bass player for Prince, needs a one-of-a-kind dress for her aerial wedding ceremony. Teddi's wedding is only a few months away, see if this daddy's girls dress will be ready in time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Seven People With Seven Opinions
programme.desc: Super fan TK brings seven of her closest friends to help her choose her dress. Actress Leslie has an unlimited budget, but she refuses to believe her opinionated mom chose the perfect wedding gown on the very first try.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Bris-fully Ignorant

programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes her must-have Thanksgiving recipes. The feast includes her foolproof simple roasted turkey with an herby butter, easy cornbread and sausage stuffing and classic giblet gravy. Plus, Ree shares the trick to a shortcut cranberry sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Kid-Approved
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing 100-percent kid-approved recipes that are all quick and easy to make. She starts with mini burgers and bite-sized fries for her fun waffle fry sliders, and the speedy 4-cheese pepperoni pizzadilla.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Ree uses a multicooker to turn seriously delicious short ribs with collards into fast food, and she punches up the flavor in her spicy Brussels Caesar salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Thanksgiving Potluck: Kitchen Confessional
programme.desc: Ree spills the beans on her Thanksgiving potluck favourites. There's a show stopping pumpkin rum cake with maple whipped cream and, for the main dish, amazing glazed ham. The best broccoli rice casserole and slow cooker sweet potatoes round it out.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Family Thanksgiving
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving on the farm, and Molly Yeh is celebrating the best way she knows how, with lots of food! She makes creamy twice-baked potatoes, a hearty brussels sprout casserole, sweet and sticky orange marmalade glazed ham and a classic, pumpkin pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Misfit Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Trisha hosts a misfit Thanksgiving for her local friends. They get glammed up while she prepares orange maple glazed turkey, rosemary shallot gravy, slow cooker acorn squash, roasted chestnut apple stuffing, champagne with pomegranate and spice cake.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: All-American
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her all-American favorites with the volume turned up. There are apple pie bars, warm lobster rolls and grilled New York strip steaks with crunchy iceberg salad. Ina also includes a new recipe for all-American toasting, bourbon sours.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Thanksgiving in the Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Michael Symon shows that Thanksgiving is the perfect time to fire up the grill, starting with traditional spatchcock smoked turkey. He follows with his 'almost famous' family corn pudding and pecan tassies for dessert, and wife Liz serves mulled wine.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Thankfull Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Kitchen offers a helping hand for turkey day with stepped-up recipes and a foolproof turkey timeline. Geoffrey makes his Thanksgiving turkey two ways, and Sunny puts her spin on a canned classic with homemade apple and ginger cranberry jelly.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Santa to the Rescue!
programme.desc: For one magical night, Santa Claus is a hero to all the world's kids. Host Raven-Symone challenges the five teams of cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens outside of the North Pole when Santa steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Can You Crack This One?
programme.desc: Five clever cookie makers celebrate 'piece' on Earth as they make festive puzzle cookies. Then it's a tall order when they have to figure out how to craft a 3-D, standing nutcracker doll out of cookies.

programme.desc: Bizarro world Robin shows up in Jump City and the Titans keep an eye on him to make sure he's not up to something. Raven is left to fight on her own when the others decide it's 'crazy day'.

programme.desc: When Beast Boy and Cyborg decide to make a Titans yearbook, Robin decides to do whatever it takes to be the most popular.

programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin discover the secret behind Anton’s immortality; The kids finally get the puppy they always wanted, except it's actually a turtle.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Name/ The Extras

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Gripes/ The Vacation

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Law/ The Allergy

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Procrastinators/ The Shell
programme.desc: Gumball inadvertently cracks open Penny's shell and discovers who she really is inside. While performing a school play, Gumball is so nervous about kissing Penny that he accidentally headbutts her and cracks open her shell.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Oracle/ The Safety
programme.desc: Gumball tries to avoid an embarrassing event predicted by Banana Joe's mother. Darwin becomes obsessed with safety after viewing a Health and Safety video.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Butterfly/ The Question
programme.desc: Gumball learns the true meaning of The Butterfly Effect. In Biology class, Gumball and Darwin are waiting for a butterfly to emerge from its chrysalis.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two for One
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan suffer from pregnancy jitters. Meanwhile, Roseanne accidentally uncovers Darlene's dark secret - she's having an affair.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lan Mao Shi Zai Wuding Shang
programme.desc: Walden reconnects with Kate and is sure she's 'the one' that is, until he meets Vivian and becomes convinced she's 'the one.' Meanwhile, Alan and Gretchen grow closer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lotta Delis in Little Armenia
programme.desc: Alan stumbles upon an opportunity to make money. Meanwhile, Walden has to address his co-dependency issues.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dial 1-900-MIX-A-LOT
programme.desc: Alan's girlfriend insists he confess his true identity to Larry, and Walden goes on a road trip with Jenny and Barry.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oh, WALD-E, Good Times Ahead
programme.desc: Alan confesses his true identity to Larry and has to face the consequences.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Ol' Mexican Spinach
programme.desc: Following a health scare on Halloween, Walden decides to reprioritize his life with Alan's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Chic Bar in Ibiza
programme.desc: When Walden asks Alan to sign a pre-nup, Alan gets offended and has second thoughts about getting married.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Glamping in a Yurt
programme.desc: Alan and Walden have a meeting with an adoption social worker that hinges on them being convincing as a loving couple. Meanwhile, Lyndsey returns after 60 days in rehab.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thirty-Eight, Sixty-Two, Thirty-Eight
programme.desc: Walden and Alan meet a birth mother who's considering them to adopt her baby.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oontz. Oontz. Oontz

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Shot a Little Girl

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sex With An Animated Ed Asner
programme.desc: Alan and Walden befriend three moms at a kids' gym but things get complicated when Walden becomes attracted to one of them. Meanwhile, Alan goes out for a girls' night with a group of moms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey
programme.desc: Walden and Alan are determined to convince their foster child, Louis, that Santa Claus is real.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bouncy, Bouncy, Bouncy, Lyndsey

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Departure Time
programme.desc: When Doug goes to meet his parents at the airport, they ask him to sign their living will.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Crash

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Scores
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly signs up Ritchie for soccer after Mr. Harris informs her and Richard that he's had trouble making friends. Christine claims not to believe in competitive sports but finds herself in competition with Richard for Mr. Harris' attention.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Endless Shrimp, Endless Night
programme.desc: Christine attempts to re-ignite the relationship between her brother Matthew and his ex-girlfriend. Meanwhile, Richard tries to get Ritchie interested in his job as a contractor.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Let Him Eat Cake

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Sleepless in Mar Vista
programme.desc: After taking some new sleeping pills, Christine wakes up to discover she made several embarrassing phone calls while knocked out.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: After sleeping with Richard's wildly attractive brother, Christine learns an astonishing secret.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Strange Bedfellows

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Christine almost gets Mr. Harris fired after unintentionally sending all the parents at Ritchie's school an email revealing that their parent/ teacher relationship may be something more. Meanwhile, Christine gets some surprising news from Mr. Harris.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Faith Off

programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Passing the Scalpel
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff performs surgeries with the help of two vet students. A tribe of fainting goats are seen by Dr. Jeff and Hector, while Dr. Amy discovers why a cute and cuddly kitten is teary-eyed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Bison Wranglers
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff discovers a large mass on a loveable canine. Dr. Don helps Kelly the vet tech with her dog's sun-damaged nose, while Dr. Baier and Hector join forces to treat wild bison.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Frenchie with a Bump
programme.desc: Coco the Frenchie needs Dr. Jeff's help to remove a large lump from her face. Vet tech Christine faces her fear of birds while helping pigeons from Rocky Mountain Adventures, and Dr. Jeff and Baier aid a red-back turtle with an infected foot.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Surgery in the Savannah
programme.desc: In the savannah, Dr. Bonnie must perform a critical surgery on zebra Zaide's badly damaged tail. Tiger Indrah gets an incredible tenth birthday surprise, and Dr. Sarah is determined to solve spider monkey Isobella's medical mystery.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Survival of the Fittest
programme.desc: Violence erupts when the new chimp Vila attempts to assume the role of matriarch. The keepers are eager to determine if Chinese croc lizards Drew and Lucy are expecting, and pink pigeon power-couple Rizzo and Kenickie find parenting to be difficult.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Frenchie with a Bump
programme.desc: Coco the Frenchie needs Dr. Jeff's help to remove a large lump from her face. Vet tech Christine faces her fear of birds while helping pigeons from Rocky Mountain Adventures, and Dr. Jeff and Baier aid a red-back turtle with an infected foot.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Tender Loving Care
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff battles to save a bearded dragon that is rushed in having a seizure. Then Dr. Nichols must figure out why a family's beloved dog is not eating and struggles to breathe. And, Dr. Amy is put to the test when a routine cat neuter turns complicated.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Surgery in the Savannah
programme.desc: In the savannah, Dr. Bonnie must perform a critical surgery on zebra Zaide's badly damaged tail. Tiger Indrah gets an incredible tenth birthday surprise, and Dr. Sarah is determined to solve spider monkey Isobella's medical mystery.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tiger Mother-daughter Drama

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: New World
programme.desc: After 25 years in a tiny clinic, the team are moving to a brand new clinic with twice the space to help animals in need. When Dr. Jeff repairs a dog's knee, he makes a special connection with her owner.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Full Speed Ahead

programme.title: North Woods Law: Occupational Hazards

programme.title: North Woods Law: In a Hot Second

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed It and Reap
programme.desc: Harvest season is the game wardens' busiest time. Warden Dudley helps an Amish family save their corn crop from a bear. Wardens Carter and McBrine hunt for a man hiding out in a cabin. Sergeant Thrasher searches for an illegal marijuana crop grower.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Steve and the Dragon

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Secrets Revealed

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Big Blue
programme.desc: The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness. It is a marine desert far from shore and many kilometers deep with nothing to eat and nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Green Seas
programme.desc: In our green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: Coral Reefs
programme.desc: Corals build themselves homes of limestone in the warm, clear, shallow seas of the tropics. Their reefs occupy less than one tenth of one per cent of the ocean floor, yet they are home to a quarter of all known marine species.

programme.title: Earth's Great Seasons: Summer
programme.desc: Celebrate the glorious nature of summer on Earth and the extraordinary ways animals and plants rise to the challenges it brings.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II: The Deep
programme.desc: Visit the unknown to discover an unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed. Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.desc: It's a military match made in heaven for Roger and Margorie. But a tangled nest of financial secrets and twisted lies ruins the young couple's future. And while the rise of their careers and romance seems meteoric, the ensuing fall is deadly.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Vows, Lies, and Whispers
programme.desc: Free-spirited Hope follows her heart to Oklahoma to marry Jerry Meek but it's not long before kids come along and the honeymoon is over. On the night of February 21, 2002, a series of mysterious events shatter the family and remain unresolved for years.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Three Pops and a Pause
programme.desc: Ashlee and Emmett Corrigan seem to have it all; true love, five beautiful children, and a growing business. But in March 2011, an explosive encounter blows their lives apart in an instant, revealing their marriage is not what it seemed.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Love, Sex, and Trucking
programme.desc: Frances and Bill Hall Jr. appear to be the perfect couple two kids, a successful business, and a 30-year marriage. But on October 13, 2013, an unexpected encounter leads to a fatality, and the investigation reveals a story of infidelity and obsession.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Control, Kill, Delete
programme.desc: Matt and Niqué Leili's love story is a modern romance. They meet online, create a blended family, and appear to have it all. But on July 8, 2011, the illusion of a happy marriage is torn apart forever.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder of Innocence: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Andrew Luster is born with a silver spoon in his mouth. But behind the sheen of his name lurks a decade-long dark and dangerous obsession - and when justice comes knocking at his door, the privileged playboy will stop at nothing to evade the law.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder of Innocence: No Escape
programme.desc: Susan Smith, a big dreamer stuck in a rural town, becomes an FBI informant to protect her kids from her jealous husband's criminal friends but her desire to do the right thing brings hellish consequences.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder of Innocence: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder of Innocence: While You Were Sleeping
programme.desc: Andrew Luster is born with a silver spoon in his mouth. But behind the sheen of his name lurks a decade-long dark and dangerous obsession - and when justice comes knocking at his door, the privileged playboy will stop at nothing to evade the law.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder of Innocence: No Escape
programme.desc: Susan Smith, a big dreamer stuck in a rural town, becomes an FBI informant to protect her kids from her jealous husband's criminal friends but her desire to do the right thing brings hellish consequences.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder of Innocence: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Vows, Lies, and Whispers
programme.desc: Free-spirited Hope follows her heart to Oklahoma to marry Jerry Meek but it's not long before kids come along and the honeymoon is over. On the night of February 21, 2002, a series of mysterious events shatter the family and remain unresolved for years.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Manson Family Murders
programme.desc: In the late 60s, Charles Manson entices dozens of young women to live with him in a California desert commune. The facade breaks when Manson orders his followers to commit a string of gruesome murders that 50 years later, still haunt the nation's psyche.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: In 1997, Heaven's Gate leader, Marshall Applewhite convinced 39 people to follow him to their graves. The world knows the horrible event as the largest mass suicide on US soil, but for followers, it was an exit strategy towards catching a UFO to heaven.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: A young mother is strangled to death in her bedroom while her young son sleeps. As Detective Fil Waters digs into the mystery, he soon learns the victim's own mother was murdered twenty-five years earlier.

programme.title: The Interrogator: The Murders at Immaculate Auto Sales
programme.desc: Three members of a tight-knit family are brutally murdered in broad daylight while working at their family owned car dealership. After an intense four-month investigation, Fil Waters boils it down to a scorned woman and an eyewitness who saw the killer.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Blood Money
programme.desc: The cold-blooded execution of an affable middle-aged couple sends shockwaves of fear through their normally quiet community. Clues are scarce, until Demery and Mayfield uncover a cache of threatening text messages from a pair of mysterious numbers.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Trapped in Place
programme.desc: A mysterious accident on Christmas eve leaves Tony Holden with a fatal neck injury, but the case is left unsolved. When Demery is called upon to reopen the investigation, he discovers a conspiracy between the most unexpected of accomplices.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Too Close to Home
programme.desc: Demery is called to the scene of a deadly roadside shootout. When the smoke clears, he realizes the victim is someone he loves. Then, an unidentified corpse hidden in the trunk of an abandoned sedan opens the door to a tragic mystery.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Loose Lips
programme.desc: In February 1990, 18-year-old Craig White gets into a truck with his cousin Jesse Watkins and is never seen again. The case goes cold, but after 17 years police suddenly arrest Jesse for Craig's murder.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Without a Trace
programme.desc: In 2007, young mother Melissa Flores vanished without a trace. Seven years later, police arrested her ex, Ronnie Denny Jr. Even though her body was never found, Denny was convicted of murder, but his family is convinced the system got it wrong.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Murder at her Doorstep
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman finds a box at her door, she picks it up and it explodes -- instantly killing her and her unborn baby. A multi-year investigation ensues, and her ex is convicted. Now, Mike Johnson's mom and daughter seek help to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Obsessed with Celeste
programme.desc: 75-year-old retired TV executive Steven Beard is shot in his own home, but his wife, Celeste Beard, didn't pull the trigger. So why is she in prison for his murder? Her mom and husband are hoping Chris and Fatima can find out.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Argo: The Secret Story
programme.desc: America is at its knees as the infamous US Embassy Hostage crisis begins, but then the CIA discovers that six diplomats have secretly escaped. When they recruit in their ace 'rescue' agent Tony Mendez to get them out, he devises a 'Hollywood'- plan.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that just came on the market which is near the beach and only $65,000.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Budget Bungalow
programme.desc: Michael sees potential in what once was a Victorian bungalow that has been eaten away by termites leaving catastrophic damage.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: The American Game: Integration
programme.desc: As much as any other sport, the history of college football tells the history of American race relations. You can't appreciate the sport's complexities without knowing how long the road has been, and continues to be, towards equal rights.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: The American Game: Recruiting
programme.desc: Everything starts with the quality of the players that a school is able to recruit. Since college football's earliest days, recruiting has been one of the most critical and controversial aspects of the sport.

programme.title: The Greatest: Innovations
programme.desc: College football has continually evolved and innovated in ways that have made the game safer, more entertaining, and more exciting. These are the top 11 innovations that have impacted the sport's history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Rivalry Games
programme.desc: Every season, college football rivals face off, and the intensity and passion are at a fever pitch. Some clashes have resulted in unforgettable games. These are the top 11 of those quintessential, classic gridiron battles.

programme.desc: In exploring the sport from the first game in 1869 to the present day, take a deep dive into central topics of college football. Some of the sport's major stars are featured including Jerry Rice, Barry Switzer, Nick Saban, Andre Ware and more.
